creator: freebsd@funzi.org
text:
Created attachment 235406
git patch for Loki 2.6.1, fixed distinfo

Thanks for spotting that.

The problem wasn't the etcd source itself. Problem were duplicate entries in distinfo. That happens if a module is referred in GH_TUPLE multiple times (and I forgot to clean it up)

Seems like it's also not always happening but depends on a race condition.

I've updated the patch and it built fine multiple times on my end (after running make distclean)
